home.title: WIN YOUR DREAM WATCH
home.subtitle: We take pride in meticulously curating a collection of watches that embody sophistication and elegance, sourced from a diverse network of over 260 partners across the world.
home.subtitle2: An assured winner who will achieve their dream, or simply that of their partner.
home.subtitle3: For every ticket sold, a significant portion goes toward supporting charitable initiatives. It's not just about winning, also about giving.
home.tempComp: The two competitions are open. You can choose to participate in either one or the other. Special offer: By participating in both competitions, we double the tickets you purchased for both competitions!
home.chooseyourticketsdesc: Please select the desired quantity of tickets, up to a maximum of 50 per person, to begin your journey towards winning the luxury timepiece.
home.playthegamedesc: We invite you to challenge your knowledge of watches by playing our online game, expertly designed to differentiate the connoisseurs from the pretenders.
home.buyticketsdesc: Upon securely submitting your entry, please note that the winner will be selected through the use of a third-party called Randomdraws.
home.winawatchdesc: And that's it! By participating with as little as £25, you stand a chance of winning a new £20,000 watch.
home.certiftitle: WE USE TPAL ELECTRONIC RANDOM DRAW COMPUTERIZED SYSTEM
home.followusdesc: Don't miss the live draw and the announcement of the next competitions on Instagram !
home.competitions2: THE COMPETITIONS, HOW TO PLAY, CONTACT, PHILOSOPHY, TRUSTPILOT, CHARITY, ACCEPTABLE USE POLICY, FAQ, RETURN POLICY, TERMS & CONDITIONS, PRIVACY POLICY
home.discount_code_will_be_sent: Discount code will be sent to your registered email. Limited-time offer.
home.get_early_access: Get early access to our competitions
home.we_believe_in_making_a_difference: We believe in making a difference
home.with_every_tick_of_the_clock: with every tick of the clock
home.to_help_seriously_ill_children: to help SERIOUSLY ILL CHILDREN. SO THAT LIFE REMAINS A GIFT...EVEN FOR THEM.
home.each_ticket_sold_support_the_michael_j_f: each ticket sold supports the Michael J. Fox Foundation
home.uses_latest_technology: Uses the latest technology to pick random winners for your draw in compliance with regulations. This means that you can feel confident that your draw is going to be unbiased and can be trusted.
home.wuw: WinUWatch is a game of skill and knowledge
home.choose_how_many_tickets: Choose how many tickets you want (Up to 50 per player) and get ready to own a prestigious timepiece.
home.test_your_watch_expertise: Test your watch expertise with our online game, meticulously crafted to separate the true connoisseurs from the casual admirers.
home.pay_safely_to_enter: Pay Safely to Enter. Our partner Randomdraws uses a third-party Random Number Generator for an impartial and secure winner selection process.
home.thats_all_there_is_to_it: That's all there is to it! With a minimal entry of just £25, you could be the lucky winner of a brand-new £20,000 timepiece.
home.your_browser_does_not_support_the_video_: Your browser does not support the video tag.
home.our_partner_randomdraws: our partner randomdraws uses a third-party random number generator for an impartial and secure winner selection process
home.watch_enthusiast: whether you're a seasoned watch enthusiast or just beginning your journey into the world of timepieces, our feed is designed to keep you informed and inspired.
home.all_sold: or until all tickets are sold out. But never after the draw date

winners.title: Our Winners
winners.subtitle: Our goal is for everyone to win the watch of their dreams.
winners.we_have_away: WE'VE GIVEN AWAY {value} WORTH OF WATCHES. Top-Ranked Globally for Unbeatable Winning Chances.
winners.only_those_who_play_end_up_winning: # Only Those Who Play End Up Winning.

philosophy.philoheader: IN OUR FAMILY-OWNED BUSINESS, WE BELIEVE THAT THERE IS NO SUCH THING AS GENIUS, ONLY "KNOW-HOW"
philosophy.philoheaderdesc: We are a large family-owned company where our team works tirelessly every day to bring you the most sought-after timepieces. We founded WINUWATCH with the goal of helping individuals turn their dream of owning a luxury watch into a reality.
philosophy.philotext: YOU SHOULD KNOW THAT WE ARE THE NUMBER ONE SITE IN THE WORLD IN TERMS OF THE PROBABILITY OF WINNING.
philosophy.philotextdesc: It is with great pride that we declare our website as the top-ranked platform worldwide in terms of the probability of winning. Our success in this regard can be attributed to our limited ticket allocation strategy, which is specifically tailored to the number of participants, resulting in the highest likelihood of winning. We remain committed to providing our esteemed users with the most optimal opportunities for success, and are honored to maintain our position as the premier website in this industry.

engagement.minimize_anxiety: They are helping to minimize the anxiety associated with the hospital environment, often perceived as hostile by the child.
engagement.lacking_equipment_help: They help hospitals which may be lacking equipment (television, video recorder, etc.)
engagement.in_room_entertainment_organization: Organization of in-room entertainment adapted to the age of the child. We must make children dream and make them smile.
engagement.financial_support_to_families: They offer financial support to families in difficulty who sometimes have to leave their jobs or, following too long hospitalization, result in unforeseen expenses.
engagement.superheroes_association: Since its inception in late 2018, the Super-Héros association has been dedicated to supporting hospitalized children and their families. The association collaborates with medical teams to fulfill each child's unique dream requests, aiming to provide tailored assistance based on their individual needs, circumstances, and aspirations. From financial aid to enhancing daily comfort, the Super-Héros association is committed to understanding and addressing the specific requirements, desires, and dreams of each family affected by the challenges of medical journeys.
engagement.mjff_exists_for_one_reason: The Michael J. Fox Foundation (MJFF) exists for one reason: to accelerate the next generation of Parkinson's disease (PD) treatments. In practice, that means identifying and funding projects most vital to patients; spearheading solutions around seemingly intractable field-wide challenges; coordinating and streamlining the efforts of multiple, often disparate, teams; and doing whatever it takes to drive faster knowledge turns for the benefit of every life touched by PD.
engagement.support_michael_j_fox_foundation: we support the Michael. j fox foundation
engagement.funded_in_research_programs_to_date: funded in research programs to date
engagement.dedicating_a_significant_portion: We take pride in dedicating a significant portion of each ticket sold to support charitable causes. This philanthropic endeavor wouldn't be possible without the invaluable assistance of the charitable associations that partner with us. We extend our heartfelt gratitude to these organizations, whose noble work drives positive change. Equally, we express deep appreciation to our vibrant community whose participation not only fuels the excitement of our lotteries but also contributes to the betterment of society.
engagement.creating_winners_fostering_community: Together, we're not just creating winners; we're fostering a community of generosity and shared success. Thank you for being a vital part of our journey.

faq.participation_process_details: Choose the number of tickets you desire, engage in our skill-based game, make your ticket purchase, and stand a chance to win an exquisite watch. It's that simple. Find more details about the process here.
faq.luxury_watch_prize_details: Every draw provides participants with the chance to win a luxury watch valued at over £10,000. Visit our homepage to discover information about the make and model of the watch up for grabs in the upcoming draw.
faq.how_many_tickets_can_i_buy: How many tickets can I buy?
faq.purchase_up_to_25_tickets: Each person can purchase up to 50 tickets.
faq.check_homepage_for_details: Check the homepage for details about the date of the next drawing.
faq.random_number_generator: We employ a third-party Random Number Generator called Randomdraws to determine the winner.
faq.how_many_winners: How many winners will there be?
faq.one_watch_winner_and_runner_ups: Every draw will have one watch winner, along with additional runner-up prizes as indicated.
faq.notification_if_win: How will I be notified if I win?
faq.winners_receive_notifications: Winners will receive notifications via email, and for an exciting live experience, participants can also access the live draw directly on Instagram.
faq.not_enough_tickets_sold: What if enough tickets aren't sold?
faq.subscriber_base_demand_expectation: With a substantial subscriber base, we expect strong demand for each draw. However, if the ticket sales fall short before the deadline, we may extend the entry period up to three times.
faq.not_a_lottery_explanation: No, it's a skill-based competition categorized as a prize competition. The outcome is influenced by a game of skill, knowledge, or judgment.
faq.skill_based_game_evaluation: The skill-based game evaluates participant's knowledge and expertise in a specific area: watches. Only those who answer the skill-based game questions correctly will progress to the final draw.
faq.participants_age_requirement: Participants must be at least 18 years old.
faq.winuwatch_family_owned_business: Winuwatch is a family-owned business situated in London, fueled by generations of passion for watches. We've established Winuwatch to share our dream with fellow watch enthusiasts and collectors.
faq.how_do_ticket_sales_support_charity: How do ticket sales support charity?
faq.charity_commitment: Our commitment primarily benefits the Super Hero Charity Foundation, dedicated to aiding ill children. Your engagement through ticket sales contributes to making a positive impact on the lives of those in need.
faq.tickets_available_for_final_draw: How many tickets are available for the final draw?
faq.total_ticket_numbers_announcement: The total number of tickets varies depending on the overall prize fund. We announce the total ticket numbers before the launch of each competition.
faq.delivery_time_after_draw: How much time does it take for the delivery of the watch after the draw?
faq.delivery_time_varies: The delivery time for the watch after the draw varies between 5 days to 21 days. Please note that delivery times may be influenced by factors such as shipping location. We strive to get your watch to you as swiftly as possible while ensuring a smooth and secure delivery experience. If you have any specific concerns or queries, feel free to reach out to our customer support team for assistance.
faq.watch_delivery_locations: Where can you deliver the watch?
faq.worldwide_delivery: We offer worldwide delivery for our watches. Regardless of your location, we are committed to ensuring that your watch reaches you wherever you are. Our global shipping network allows us to deliver our timepieces to customers around the world. Please be aware that shipping times may vary depending on your location. Please note that we are not responsible for any customs fees, taxes, VAT, or shipping costs that may apply. The buyer is solely responsible for these charges. For any specific delivery-related inquiries, feel free to contact our customer support team for assistance.

howToPlay.get_chance_to_win:
Get a chance to win the next contest and get your dream watch.
 No matter how many tickets are sold, the competition will take place and there will be a winner. The date of the competition cannot be postponed; however, it can be moved up in case of a sold-out event.

about_us.register_for_our_newsletter: Register for our newsletter now and enjoy an irresistible 25% discount on your first ticket to enter our luxury watch competition
about_us.winuwatch_stands_as_a_testament_to_the_p: WINUWATCH stands as a testament to the passion & commitment of
about_us.with_great_pride: It is with great pride that we declare our website as the top-ranked platform worldwide in terms of the probability of winning. Our success in this regard can be attributed to our limited ticket allocation strategy, which is specifically tailored to the number of participants, resulting in the highest likelihood of winning. We remain committed to providing our esteemed users with the most optimal opportunities for success, and are honored to maintain our position as the premier website in this industry.
about_us.only_those_who_play_end_up_winning: #only those who play end up winning
about_us.family_owned_company: As a family-owned company, WINUWATCH was founded with the explicit goal of assisting individuals in realizing their dream of owning a luxury watch, and our devoted team works tirelessly to curate the most sought-after timepieces for you.
